reviews.comment:
Solo aceptan pago en efectivo. Le dije al playero que es obligatorio que tengan la opción débito. Me contestó que en el campo las cosas funcionan de otro modo. (Pues entonces, si no tenés posnet, andá a ordeñar vacas, Patoruzu!).

(Translated by Google)
They only accept cash. I told the gas station attendant that it's mandatory for them to have a debit card option. He replied that things work differently in the countryside. (Well then, if you don't have a card reader, go milk cows, Patoruzu!).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtemFfcXRBRRAB
